description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a modern, boxy architectural style. The exterior features a red brick facade with large, evenly spaced rectangular windows on both floors, providing ample natural light. The front of the house includes a paved walkway leading to a recessed entryway flanked by two tall, narrow trees, and a covered porch area with outdoor seating. On one side, there is a large rectangular swimming pool with a metal ladder and a paved poolside area. The rear of the house opens to a patio with additional seating, and the overall layout is open and spacious, with clear separation between indoor and outdoor living spaces. The house is surrounded by minimal landscaping, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, a front walkway, and a backyard swimming pool. The design features clean lines, a covered porch, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: This view shows the open rear of the house with a covered patio, outdoor seating, and a large swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front entryway with a paved path, two tall trees, and the pool to the left side of the house.
description_view_2: This view displays the solid brick back wall with symmetrical window rows and minimal landscaping on the left.
description_view_3: This view shows the side of the house with windows, the pool extending along the right, and a partial view of the patio area.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a paved walkway, flanked by two tall trees, and a covered porch area with outdoor seating.
